landing.tagline: Snap Your Plate. Know Your Food.
landing.description: AI-powered food wellness dashboard. Get instant nutrition breakdown, processing-level transparency, and personalized insights from a single photo.
landing.step1Description: Take a photo of your meal or upload from your camera roll
landing.step2Description: AI identifies foods, estimates portions, and calculates nutrition
landing.step3Description: See processing levels, nutrient gaps, and personalized insights

scan.title: Scan your meal
scan.prompt: Point your camera at your plate
scan.analyzingPrompt: This takes just a few seconds
scan.cameraUnavailable: Camera unavailable — use file upload below
scan.proTipMessage: Include a credit card, fork, or phone next to your plate for more accurate portion estimates! (NYU research-backed)

dashboard.title: Wellness Dashboard
dashboard.referenceObjectMessage: Portion estimates are more accurate! (NYU research-backed)
dashboard.correctionsSaved: ✅ Corrections saved! Your feedback helps improve accuracy.

journal.title: Meal Journal
journal.noMealsPrompt: Scan a meal to start tracking.

onboarding.title: Set up your health profile
onboarding.subtitle: Select any conditions that apply. PlateIQ will flag meals that exceed clinical limits for each.
onboarding.skip: Skip — I don't have any conditions

hypertension.label: Hypertension
hypertension.description: High blood pressure — track sodium & potassium

stroke_risk.label: Stroke Risk
stroke_risk.description: Combined sodium, saturated fat & potassium tracking

neighborhood.title: Neighborhood Health
neighborhood.subtitle: Explore chronic disease data by ZIP code
neighborhood.description: CDC PLACES API integration for neighborhood health metrics.
neighborhood.descriptionLine2: See how your food choices connect to community health outcomes.

quality.title: Food Quality Breakdown
quality.tooltip: Foods are grouped by how processed they are — from whole foods (fresh produce, plain meat) to ultra-processed (packaged snacks, fast food with additives).

editFoodModal.title: Edit Food Item
editFoodModal.infoNote: 💡 Your corrections help improve accuracy. The app learns from your edits to provide better results over time.

aiInsights.title: AI Wellness Insights
aiInsights.excellentChoice: Excellent choice! This meal features whole, unprocessed foods that provide sustained energy and essential nutrients.
aiInsights.goodMeal: Good meal with mostly minimally processed ingredients.
aiInsights.someProcessed: This meal contains some processed foods. Consider swapping processed items for whole food alternatives when possible.
aiInsights.heavilyProcessed: This meal is heavily processed. Try replacing ultra-processed items with whole foods to improve nutritional quality.
aiInsights.lowFiber: This meal is low in fiber ({{grams}}g). Try adding beans, lentils, or leafy greens to boost fiber intake.
aiInsights.addProtein: Consider adding a lean protein source like chicken, fish, tofu, or legumes.
aiInsights.addVegetables: Add colorful vegetables to increase vitamins and minerals.
aiInsights.swapSuggestionSauce: 💡 Swap suggestion: Replace store-bought sauce with homemade using fresh tomatoes and herbs.
aiInsights.swapSuggestionPasta: 💡 Swap suggestion: Try whole grain or legume-based pasta for more fiber and protein.
aiInsights.swapSuggestionGeneric: 💡 Swap suggestion: Replace {{food}} with a whole food alternative.

foodSegmentation.altText: Your meal with food detection overlay
foodSegmentation.attribution: Visual segmentation powered by NYU Tandon research methodology
